basic_info.title: Fire Emblem: Three Houses
basic_info.review: Fire Emblem: Three Houses is a masterpiece of tactical RPG design, combining deep character relationships, strategic combat, and meaningful choices that shape the story in multiple directions.

alternative_names: ファイアーエムブレム 風花雪月 (Japanese)
Fire Emblem: Three Houses - Complete Edition

play_today.details: The definitive version with all DLC content available via Expansion Pass. Best experience in handheld mode for portability, or docked for better visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Expansion Pass
recommended_patches.description: Official DLC adding 4 waves of content including new characters (Hilda, Sylvain, etc.), story routes, and gameplay features

recommended_patches.name: 1.2.0 Update
recommended_patches.description: Official update adding unit appearance customization and quality-of-life improvements

description.synopsis: Byleth, a mercenary and professor at the Garreg Mach Monastery, must choose one of three houses to lead through a war-torn continent while managing relationships with students who will become their allies or enemies.
key_features: Three distinct story routes based on house choice
Tactical turn-based combat with permadeath option
Multiple endings determined by player choices
Extensive character customization and relationship system
description.long_description: Fire Emblem: Three Houses, developed by Koei Tecmo's Omega Force team in collaboration with Intelligent Systems, was released for Nintendo Switch on July 26, 2019. It is the sixteenth main installment in the Fire Emblem franchise and represents a major evolution of the series' formula. Players take on the role of Byleth, a mercenary turned professor at Garreg Mach Monastery, where they teach students from three noble houses while navigating political intrigue and an impending war. The game features unprecedented depth with three distinct story routes (Golden Deer, Black Eagles, Blue Lions), each offering unique characters, storylines, and endings. The Expansion Pass adds additional content including the Crimson Flower route, new playable characters, and gameplay enhancements. With over 100 hours of gameplay for a complete playthrough including all DLC, it's widely considered one of the best tactical RPGs ever made.
legacy_and_impact: Became the best-selling Fire Emblem game in history
Revolutionized the series with social simulation mechanics
Set new standards for character depth and relationship systems
The Expansion Pass became a model for DLC integration
Continues to receive community support years after release
